IN1.observed: test_validate_rejects_invalid_authority_documents and test_validate_graph_schema_and_main PASSED (the dev-graph schema/C11 gate accepts confirmed spec/architecture with lineage and rejects invalid authority docs). The R3 import evidence gates are pinned by two deterministic scripts wired into the SKILL goal-seek verification block: validate-evidence-refs.py (evidence_ref existence, exit 2 on registered dangling) and validate-source-digest.py (per-path source_digest equality, exit 2 on reuse) — both cover 5 unit cases each in tests/test_validate_evidence_refs.py / tests/test_validate_source_digest.py. In the OUT1 live trial r10 both gates executed with EXIT:0 (registered_dangling=[], registered_mismatch=[]) and the system-spec-harness coverage/source-citation gate landed at exit0 through the harness 4 entry points to evaluator PASS.

test_refs: independent: fresh evaluator confirmed r15-window produce (graph_revision 0->2 via C02, mtimes in run window)
OUT1.observed: main 取り込み (origin 9227058) で guard-graph-schema.py (全 skill の plugin hooks 閉包) と bd-bridge.py が変わり 宣言済み挙動閉包 digest が動いたため 2026-07-22 に再実走 (r15)。前回 r14 は pre-converged fixture のため生成パスを通らず fresh evaluator に FAIL 判定されたので、clean baseline fixture (graph nodes 空・compile 成果なし) から再実走。対象 Skill を Skill tool で起動し 4 entry points (elicit/doc-fetch/compile/completeness-evaluator) を各1回駆動、system-spec/specs/architecture 成果物を実走窓内 mtime で生成。SPEC/ARCH ノードを upsert-node.py 経由 (C02 単一 writer) で graph_revision 0->1->2 と新規登録し、両ノードとも source_lineage 6 キー完備。C11 validate-graph-schema.py と validate-source-digest.py はいずれも exit 0・mismatch 0。fresh evaluator (別個体 Agent) が mtime と revision 遷移で『この実走の produce』を厳密確認して goal_fit=PASS を独立判定。live-trial verdict の skill_dir_tree_sha は現閉包と一致する。
